body:
```suggestion
  ### Inherited args are missing for components from workspace packages
```
author: kylegach

body:
```suggestion
  If you're using `react-docgen-typescript` in a monorepo with npm/yarn/pnpm workspaces, you may find that components imported from a workspace package are missing inherited args (e.g., MUI's `ButtonProps`), while the same component imported locally works fine.
```
author: kylegach

body:
```suggestion
  Adjust the path (`../../packages/ui/src/**/*.tsx`) to match your monorepo layout. Note that `tsconfigPath` only affects compiler options. It does not change which files are included in the TypeScript program.
```

Can you clarify the `tsconfigPath` part? It seems to be missing some context.
author: kylegach
